title: Are we not under the Torah because of sacred geography? God's relocation program?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: # Are we not under the Torah because of sacred geography? God's relocation program?
content:
# Are we not under the Torah because of sacred geography? God's relocation program?

Like did God give the earth to the lower heaven powers to carve it up as they will, and then move us up above them through enthroning Yeshua the human Messiah and possessing , descended life-giving spirit. Our human heaven father (Circa 1 Corinthians 15)

![Notes_250527_032842.jpg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/738f417b-92b7-4763-b9b1-920839282340)

**Galatians 5:18 LEB But if you are led by the Spirit, you are not under the law.**

exodus 24, heaven tablets under his feet, he is now enthroned ABOVE the Sanhedrin, above the earthly temple, above ever name that is named, the superceded via ascencion and going above the paygrade of all the powers.

We are caught up in this through the on the earth, descended, possessing spirit

"UNDER" circa divine hierarchy and altitude = status of exaltation

It's not that Torah of earth (Sinai Covenant) has been abrogated. It's that laws of earth CANNOT apply in highest heaven.

- laws of marriage can't apply
- laws of animals can't apply
- laws of decomposition can't apply
- laws of contact can't apply
- laws of patronage and national natural human descent can't apply

the possessing Spirit of the human Messiah Yeshua has made us to share in his above_human/more-than-human ontology

we are not earthly-down-here- subject - humans anymore post SPIRIT-sealing post-circumcision of the heart/ reception of the Spirit (circa I Corinthians 3, acting like humans, 1 Corinthians 3:4
LEB For whenever anyone says, “I am with Paul,” and another, “I am with Apollos,” are you not merely human?
SBLGNT ὅταν γὰρ λέγῃ τις· Ἐγὼ μέν εἰμι Παύλου, ἕτερος δέ· Ἐγὼ Ἀπολλῶ, ⸂οὐκ ἄνθρωποί⸃ ἐστε;)
